title: Screamerpack RP
description: This resource pack will help you prank and scare your friend in vanilla Minecraft.
body:
**This resource pack doesn't seem to do anything at first glance.** But when you have white dye in any form _(in your hand, in your inventory, on the screen, or in a chest)_, a frightening jumpscare appears across the entire screen. The jumpscare itself isn't scary, but it's creepy. You want to get rid of it as quickly as possible, but the only way to get rid of it is to stop seeing the white dye.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cd68a64eaecfc98d3fefe2176ddb2aed4bcc02d.png)

This resource pack is definitely a good way to scare your friend, but **don't use it maliciously!**

**Create a jumpscare:** `/give #nick white_dye`

**Remove it:** `/clear #nick white_dye`
